examples.sentence: 駅に着くか着かないかのうちに、雨が降り出した。
examples.translation: No sooner had I arrived at the station than it started raining.
examples.translationEn: No sooner had I arrived at the station than it started raining
examples.romaji: Eki ni tsuku ka tsukanai ka no uchi ni, ame ga furidashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: No sooner had I arrived at the station than it started raining

examples.sentence: ケータイを買うか買わないかのうちに、新しいモデルが発売された。
examples.translation: As soon as I decided to buy the cell phone, a new model was released.
examples.translationEn: As soon as I decided to buy the cell phone, a new model was released
examples.romaji: Keitai o kau ka kawanai ka no uchi ni, atarashii moderu ga hatsubai sareta.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: As soon as I decided to buy the cell phone, a new model was released

examples.sentence: 彼が家を出るか出ないかのうちに、電話が鳴った。
examples.translation: The moment he left the house, the phone rang.
examples.translationEn: The moment he left the house, the phone rang
examples.romaji: Kare ga ie o deru ka denai ka no uchi ni, denwa ga natta.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: The moment he left the house, the phone rang

examples.sentence: パーティーが始まるか始まらないかのうちに、彼女が泣き出した。
examples.translation: As soon as the party began, she started crying.
examples.translationEn: As soon as the party began, she started crying
examples.romaji: Pātī ga hajimaru ka hajimaranai ka no uchi ni, kanojo ga nakidashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: As soon as the party began, she started crying

examples.sentence: 彼はあまりにも無責任で、約束を破りかねない。
examples.translation: He is so irresponsible that he might break his promise.
examples.translationEn: He is so irresponsible that he might break his promise
examples.romaji: Kare wa amarini mo musekinin de, yakusoku o yaburi-kane nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He is so irresponsible that he might break his promise

examples.sentence: 注意しないと、事故を起こしかねない。
examples.translation: If you don't pay attention, you might cause an accident.
examples.translationEn: If you dont pay attention, you might cause an accident
examples.romaji: Chūi shinai to, jiko o okoshi-kane nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: If you dont pay attention, you might cause an accident

examples.sentence: このアプリはバグが多いので、クラッシュしかねない。
examples.translation: Since this app has many bugs, it might crash.
examples.translationEn: Since this app has many bugs, it might crash
examples.romaji: Kono apuri wa bagu ga ōi no de, kurasshu shi-kane nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Since this app has many bugs, it might crash

examples.sentence: 彼女は緊張しているので、失敗しかねない。
examples.translation: She's so nervous that she might fail.
examples.translationEn: Shes so nervous that she might fail
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa kinchō shite iru no de, shippai shi-kane nai.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Shes so nervous that she might fail

examples.sentence: その問題は難しいので、私には解決しかねます。
examples.translation: Since that problem is difficult, I cannot solve it.
examples.translationEn: Since that problem is difficult, I cannot solve it
examples.romaji: Sono mondai wa muzukashii no de, watashi ni wa kaiketsu shi-kanemasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Since that problem is difficult, I cannot solve it

examples.sentence: 彼の言っていることが真実かどうか判断しかねます。
examples.translation: I cannot judge whether what he is saying is true or not.
examples.translationEn: I cannot judge whether what he is saying is true or not
examples.romaji: Kare no itte iru koto ga shinjitsu ka dō ka handan shi-kanemasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I cannot judge whether what he is saying is true or not

examples.sentence: 彼女が来るかどうか今すぐには分かりかねます。
examples.translation: I cannot immediately know whether she will come or not.
examples.translationEn: I cannot immediately know whether she will come or not
examples.romaji: Kanojo ga kuru ka dō ka ima sugu ni wa wakari-kanemasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I cannot immediately know whether she will come or not

examples.sentence: 詳しい内容については説明しかねます。
examples.translation: I cannot explain the details.
examples.translationEn: I cannot explain the details
examples.romaji: Kuwashii naiyō ni tsuite wa setsumei shi-kanemasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: I cannot explain the details

examples.sentence: 彼は犬が怖いかのようだ。
examples.translation: He seems as if he is scared of dogs.
examples.translationEn: He seems as if he is scared of dogs
examples.romaji: Kare wa inu ga kowai ka no you da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: He seems as if he is scared of dogs

examples.sentence: この部屋は寒いかのようだ。

examples.translationEn: This room feels as if its cold
examples.romaji: Kono heya wa samui ka no you da.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: This room feels as if its cold

examples.sentence: 彼女は有名人であるかのようだ。

examples.translation: I haven't decided whether to take on this project or not.

examples.sentence: 彼が成功しようか成功するまいか、今は予測できない。
examples.translation: Whether he will succeed or not is unpredictable at the moment.
examples.translationEn: Whether he will succeed or not is unpredictable at the moment

examples.sentence: この問題は簡単であるか難しいであるまいか、意見が分かれている。
examples.translation: Opinions are divided on whether this problem is simple or difficult.
examples.translationEn: Opinions are divided on whether this problem is simple or difficult
examples.romaji: Kono mondai wa kantan de aru ka muzukashii de aru maika, iken ga wakarete iru.

examples.sentence: 彼はリーダーであるかフォロワーであるまいか、自分で選ぶべきだ。
examples.translation: He should choose for himself whether he is a leader or a follower.
examples.translationEn: He should choose for himself whether he is a leader or a follower

examples.sentence: 失敗したからこそ、成功の意味がわかる。
examples.translation: It is precisely because I failed that I understand the meaning of success.
examples.translationEn: It is precisely because I failed that I understand the meaning of success
examples.romaji: Shippai shita kara koso, seikou no imi ga wakaru.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: It is precisely because I failed that I understand the meaning of success

examples.sentence: 苦しかったからこそ、今日の私がある。

examples.translationEn: It is precisely because I went through hardships that I am who I am today

examples.sentence: 昔の経験があるからこそ、その問題がよく理解できる。
